content:
## Overview
Model targets, contexts, and variables in the environment section.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Automation Framework Environment (Workflow 16)
steps: Define context names and top-level URLs.
Set variables for hostnames and ports.
